cases.question: Who sent the HARICA certificate mail?
cases.expected_answer: cert-admin@example.org sent the HARICA certificate reply.
cases.notes: Synthetic reply in _wichtig: subject AW: Zertifikat Harica.

cases.question: Which folder contains the Apple Support notes import message?
cases.expected_answer: The Apple Support notes import message is in the memo folder.
cases.notes: Synthetic original in memo: Notizen und Dateien in die Notizen-App importieren - Apple Support (DE).

cases.question: Which message mentioned the Windows 11 TPM constraint?
cases.expected_answer: The Windows 11 TPM constraint message is Microsoft: So schalten wir den TPM-Zwang in Windows 11 ab - Golem.de.
cases.notes: Synthetic original in _wichtig from 2021-10-07.

cases.question: Who announced that the Zammad test version was created?
cases.expected_answer: service-owner@example.org announced the Zammad test version.
cases.notes: Synthetic original in _wichtig: Zammad Testversion.

cases.question: Who sent the IT Besprechnung 07.05.2025 email?
cases.expected_answer: coordinator.one@example.org sent the IT Besprechnung 07.05.2025 email.
cases.notes: Synthetic attachment-bearing message in _wichtig from 2025-05-08.

cases.question: Who sent the Workshop KI message?
cases.expected_answer: trainer.one@example.org sent the Workshop KI message.
cases.notes: Synthetic message in _wichtig from 2024-10-22.

cases.question: When did the Zammad Reboot 2026 thread begin?
cases.expected_answer: In the current 400-message live eval corpus slice, the retained Zammad Reboot 2026 thread anchor is from 2025-12-04T14:31:04.
cases.notes: Live corpus alignment: the fixed 400-message sqlite slice retains only one sampled Zammad Reboot 2026 message.

cases.question: Which messages belong to the Zammad Reboot 2026 conversation?
cases.expected_answer: In the current 400-message live eval corpus slice, the retained Zammad Reboot 2026 conversation sample contains the 2025-12-04 Sent Items reply.
cases.notes: Live corpus alignment: only one sampled Zammad Reboot 2026 thread member is present in the fixed sqlite eval slice.

cases.question: When did the Physics Reimagined thread begin?
cases.expected_answer: The Physics Reimagined thread began on 2022-06-28T16:04:50.
cases.notes: Real six-message conversation in _wichtig/beitraege-forschung.

cases.question: Which messages belong to the quick and dirty conversation?
cases.expected_answer: The quick and dirty conversation contains the five Sent Items replies from 2025-12-04 through 2025-12-05.
cases.notes: Real five-message conversation in Sent Items with attachments.

cases.question: Which email had attachments and discussed Configurator 2 Blueprints?
cases.expected_answer: The MDM email from 2025-05-27 discussed Configurator 2 Blueprints and had attachments.
cases.notes: Attachment-bearing original in _wichtig.

cases.question: Which email had the manual attachment for zammad agent manual?
cases.expected_answer: The Sent Items original zammad agent manual email had the manual attachment.
cases.notes: Attachment-bearing original in Sent Items with body Md im Anhang.

cases.question: Which Personalrat email in the mobiles Arbeiten thread had attachments?
cases.expected_answer: The Personalrat reply in the mobiles Arbeiten thread had attachments.
cases.notes: Synthetic attachment-bearing reply from staff-council@example.org in _wichtig.

cases.question: Which forwarded email opened the Videographie-Manual attachment thread?
cases.expected_answer: The forwarded Videographie-Manual email from 2023-04-21 opened the thread.
cases.notes: Real forwarded attachment-bearing message in _wichtig/beitraege-forschung.

cases.question: What did the HP scan attachment say?
cases.expected_answer: The system can identify the scan email but not recover readable body text from it.
cases.notes: Real scan mail with attachment and empty/weak recoverable body.

cases.question: Which source-shell message discussed zammad DNS and certificate?
cases.expected_answer: The source-shell message AW: zammad DNS und Zertifikat matches, but the visible body remains weak.
cases.notes: Real source-shell reply in _wichtig.

cases.question: Which image-only message was titled Schreibtisch?
cases.expected_answer: The image-only message titled Schreibtisch matches, but the message has no recoverable authored text.
cases.notes: Real image-only message in _wichtig from 2022-10-13.

cases.question: Which image-only message was titled Manual?
cases.expected_answer: The image-only message titled Manual matches, but the message has no recoverable authored text.
cases.notes: Real image-only message in _wichtig from 2020-11-30.

cases.question: Which message said here is our trace in the LoLa with EAMT thread?
cases.expected_answer: The quoted-trace message is RE: LoLa with EAMT this week from 2023-03-22T11:51:44.
cases.notes: Real quote-heavy LoLa thread with nested From/On quoted blocks.

cases.question: Which forwarded ZZT digital email quoted Vera Sander?
cases.expected_answer: The likely forwarded quote-heavy ZZT digital message is FW: ZZT digital from 2021-03-05T08:04:58.
cases.notes: Real forwarded message whose preserved body begins with a From header.

cases.question: Which Panopto Anfrage email carried eight attachments?
cases.expected_answer: The Panopto Anfrage message with eight attachments is Re: Panopto Anfrage from 2023-07-19T13:56:38.
cases.notes: Real attachment-heavy Panopto thread message with nested quoted content.

cases.question: Which attachment-only message was titled LoLa Manual?
cases.expected_answer: The attachment-only message titled LoLa Manual is from 2023-05-15T08:33:59.
cases.notes: Real attachment-only message in the corpus; useful for attachment-heavy weak-evidence coverage.

cases.question: Which source-shell-only message was titled FW Update HP?
cases.expected_answer: The source-shell-only message FW Update HP matches, but the visible authored body remains weak.
cases.notes: Real source-shell-only forwarded message from 2022-02-01.

cases.question: Which message anchors the packed quick and dirty thread answer?
cases.expected_answer: The packed quick and dirty thread answer is anchored on uid 06a9f338e135c8acd077a57769d0f390.
cases.notes: Real long-thread anchor case promoted from the AQ24 live subset.
